summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0 fixes: Fuzzy Matching in Optimization Algorithm and Multi-Source Scraping System. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed - PrezziPage shows source toggles (DoveConviene, Pepesto API, Cross-Ref), source badges on preview results, and optimization correctly finds products with quantity suffixes via fuzzy matching.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/ottimizza: 'Olio Extravergine 1L' matches 'Olio Extravergine' in DB via fuzzy matching
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: 'Pasta Penne 500g' matches 'Pasta Penne' in DB via fuzzy matching
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: 'Mozzarella 250g' matches 'Mozzarella' in DB via fuzzy matching
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: Exact match works - 'Latte Intero' matches products in DB
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: Unknown product 'ProdottoInesistenteXYZ123' returns in prodotti_non_trovati
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: Location filtering works for Pioltello (Lombardia stores returned)
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: Location filtering works for Catania (Sicilia stores returned)
✅ GET /api/scraper/categories: Returns fonti_disponibili with doveconviene, pepesto, cross_reference
✅ POST /api/scraper/search-preview: DoveConviene returns results for 'latte' (39 products found)
✅ POST /api/scraper/search-preview: Results include 'fonte' field per product
✅ POST /api/scraper/run: Triggers background scraping without error
✅ GET /api/scraper/status: Returns scraping status with in_corso boolean
✅ POST /api/matrice-prezzi: Fuzzy matching works for price matrix
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: Response structure has all required fields (piano_ottimale, costo_totale, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Login page loads correctly with email/password fields
✅ Frontend: PrezziPage shows source toggles (DoveConviene, Pepesto API, Cross-Ref)
✅ Frontend: PrezziPage shows source badges on preview results (41 badges found)
✅ Frontend: Search preview returns results with fonte field
✅ Frontend: Full scrape button shows '3 fonti' count
✅ Frontend: Optimization results page shows products found with fuzzy matching
✅ Frontend: Products with quantity suffixes (1L, 500g, 250g) successfully optimized
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data from iteration 7 (33 supermarkets, 6963 products)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes fully tested and working. Fuzzy matching in /api/ottimizza correctly strips quantity suffixes (1L, 500g, 250g, ml, kg, pz, etc.) from product names before matching. Multi-source scraping system has 3 sources: doveconviene (primary, working), pepesto (requires PEPESTO_API_KEY, returns 0 results without key - expected), cross_reference (analyzes existing DB data). DoveConviene scraping is real and returns actual product data from volantini. Test user: fuzzy@test.com / Test1234!

mocked_apis.DoveConviene scraping: NOT MOCKED - Real scraping from doveconviene.it
mocked_apis.Pepesto API: NOT MOCKED but returns 0 results (PEPESTO_API_KEY not configured - expected behavior)
mocked_apis.Cross-reference: NOT MOCKED - Analyzes existing DB data
